thoughts_auth_middleware_688185489343.content: All target routes were already protected with withAuth before the task began; the real work was identifying residual gaps.

thoughts_auth_middleware_688186733312.content: withAuth HOC had no unit tests and protected endpoints had no integration tests — a common gap when auth is added incrementally.

facts_auth__type_safety_688187837069.content: Role type mismatch between UserStore.UserRole and withAuth's expected roles is a common footgun when auth is wired up across layers.
